expectations.text: Does not use Inter, Roboto, Arial, or system-ui as the primary display font — chooses a distinctive alternative
expectations.evidence: Display/heading font is "Playfair Display" (distinctive serif, passes). However, the body/UI font is explicitly "Inter" — listed as the primary sans-serif: "font-sans: ['Inter', 'system-ui', 'sans-serif']". Inter is one of the banned generic fonts and is used as the primary body font throughout all components.

expectations.text: Uses rich dark backgrounds (not pure #000000) with tinted or warm undertones
expectations.evidence: Primary background is #0C0B0E ("Obsidian"), elevated is #1A181D ("Charcoal"), surface is #252329 ("Graphite"). None are pure #000000. Explicitly states "Pure black feels sterile. Warm obsidian creates depth." The colors have a slight warm-purple undertone.

expectations.text: Defines a color system using CSS custom properties or Tailwind theme extension for consistency
expectations.evidence: Defines a full Tailwind theme extension in tailwind.config.js with named color tokens: obsidian, charcoal, graphite, slate-edge, ash, ivory, gold (with light variant), sage, pewter. Also adds custom letterSpacing (editorial: '0.08em'). No CSS custom properties (:root vars) are used, but the Tailwind extension qualifies.

expectations.text: Includes scroll-triggered or staggered entrance animations with CSS or a motion library
expectations.evidence: Implements useScrollReveal hook with IntersectionObserver. Defines CSS utility classes: animate-fade-up (translateY 30px + opacity), animate-hr-grow (scaleX), stagger-child with nth-child delays (80ms increments up to 6 children). Hero has fade-in entrance on load. Features grid, Showcase, Testimonials, Pricing all use scroll-triggered reveals.

expectations.text: Includes a prefers-reduced-motion media query or check to disable animations for accessibility
expectations.evidence: No @media (prefers-reduced-motion) query appears anywhere in the output. No JavaScript matchMedia check for reduced motion. The useScrollReveal hook has no reduced-motion handling. The CSS animations in index.css have no reduced-motion override. Grep confirms zero matches for 'reduced-motion' or 'prefers-reduced' in the entire output.

expectations.text: Attempts to open the result in a browser (Chrome extension, Playwright MCP, or mentions the need to verify visually)
expectations.evidence: The output includes a "Verification Steps" section listing 10 manual checks (e.g., "open localhost:3000, verify dark background renders"), but these are written as instructions for the user to follow manually. There is no attempt to actually open a browser, use Playwright MCP, Chrome extension, or run any automated verification. No browser tool detection or usage is present — it is purely a checklist of what to check by hand.

expectations.text: The overall aesthetic direction is clearly editorial/premium — not a generic tech startup template
expectations.evidence: Concept is "The Editorial Studio" — explicitly references Monocle magazine and Swiss design. Uses Playfair Display serif for headlines, gold accent instead of blue/purple, 1px gap grid for magazine-style feature cards, no border-radius anywhere ("sharp corners signal intentionality"), editorial dividers with gold rules, and two-tier pricing. Design decisions table documents anti-generic choices. However, use of Inter for body text slightly undermines the premium feel.
